Patch Set 25: Code-Review+1

If you have another chance to refresh the patch, please also refine racer/file_create.sh as follows:

diff --git a/lustre/tests/racer/file_create.sh b/lustre/tests/racer/file_create.sh
index b1704d3..f72fb4a 100755
--- a/lustre/tests/racer/file_create.sh
+++ b/lustre/tests/racer/file_create.sh
@@ -12,8 +12,11 @@ while /bin/true; do
        # $RANDOM is between 0 and 32767, and we want $blockcount in 64kB units
        blockcount=$((RANDOM * MAX_MB / 32 / 64))
        stripecount=$((RANDOM % (OSTCOUNT + 1)))
-       [ $OSTCOUNT -gt 0 ] &&
-               $LFS setstripe -c $stripecount $DIR/$file 2> /dev/null
+       if [ $((RANDOM % 3)) -eq 0 ]; then
+               $LFS setstripe -E 1M -L mdt -E eof -c $stripecount $DIR/$file 2> /dev/null
+       else
+               $LFS setstripe -E 1M -E eof -c $stripecount $DIR/$file 2> /dev/null
+       fi
        dd if=/dev/zero of=$DIR/$file bs=64k count=$blockcount 2> /dev/null
 done

I have been using this for testing and found it very useful.

commit.subject: LU-3285 test: add Data-on-MDT tests and fixes
commit.message:
LU-3285 test: add Data-on-MDT tests and fixes

- add test for basic DoM functionality in sanity.sh
- add test to read/write many files with small chunks of data,
  it is used for performance comparision.
- the sanity-dom.sh is added to test Data-on-MDT.
  It contains specific sanity tests and calls sanity.sh and
  sanityn.sh with limited set of test to cover the same cases
  as OSC.
- fixes for DoM code for issues revealed by tests.
